mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_events ( user_id, product_id, recommendation_id, event_type, source_page, video_id, category_name, brand, target_url, metadata_json ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{recommendationId}, #{eventType}, #{sourcePage}, #{videoId}, #{categoryName}, #{brand}, #{targetUrl}, #{metadataJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_id, user_id, product_id, recommendation_id, event_type, source_page, video_id, category_name, brand, target_url, metadata_json, created_at FROM user_events WHERE event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.title AS title, p.brand AS brand, p.category_name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.review_count AS reviewCount, p.rating AS rating, h.viewed_at AS viewedAt, h.view_count AS viewCount FROM ( SELECT product_id, MAX(created_at) AS viewed_at, COUNT(1) AS view_count FROM user_events WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_type = 'PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW' AND product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY product_id ) h INNER JOIN products p ON h.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY h.viewed_at DESC, p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT product_id FROM user_events WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_type = 'PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW' AND product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY product_id ) h INNER JOIN products p ON h.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.visible_yn = 'Y'
